title: Manifest
description: Mission manifest for a NASA Mars rover, including launch/landing dates, mission status, and per-sol photo breakdowns.

landing_date.description: Date the rover landed on Mars (YYYY-MM-DD).

launch_date.description: Date the rover launched from Earth (YYYY-MM-DD).

max_sol.description: Maximum Martian sol reached and stored in the database.

max_date.description: Maximum Earth date reached and stored in the database.

total_photos.description: Total photos taken by this rover stored in the database.

photos.description: Per-sol summary of photo counts and cameras used.

SolSummary.title: SolSummary
SolSummary.description: Summary of photos taken on a single Martian sol.

earth_date.description: Earth date corresponding to this sol.

total_photos.description: Total photos taken on this sol.
